title: US House passes War Powers Resolution 215-208 — 4 Republicans defect (Barrett, Davidson, Fitzpatrick, Massie); first successful House WPR on Iran war
snippet: The US House of Representatives passed a War Powers Resolution on June 3 by a vote of 215-208, directing President Trump to end hostilities with Iran. Four Republicans broke ranks: Tom Barrett (MI), Warren Davidson (OH), Brian Fitzpatrick (PA), and Thomas Massie (KY). This marks the first time the House successfully passed a WPR on the Iran war. The resolution is largely symbolic — the Senate is unlikely to pass it, and Trump would veto.
tag_reason: 신규 사건 — 하원이 이란 전쟁에 대해 최초로 전쟁권한법 결의안을 통과시킴. 215-208 양당 투표로 4명의 공화당원이 이탈. 실질 효력은 제한적이나 전쟁에 대한 의회 반발의 이정표
